description: Visual freshness timer on pipeline deal cards + weekly Slack hygiene digest to keep deals active or close them out

userStories.title: Expose days_since_last_activity in Pipeline RPC
userStories.description: As a developer, I want get_pipeline_with_health to return days_since_last_activity so the frontend can render freshness indicators
acceptanceCriteria: get_pipeline_with_health RPC returns days_since_last_activity from deal_health_scores table
Value is null when no health score exists (not 0)
Verify days_since_last_activity counts ALL activity types (meeting, email, call, proposal)
Add composite index on activities(deal_id, created_at DESC) if missing
npx supabase db push --linked --dry-run passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update PipelineDeal Type and Fallback
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the PipelineDeal TypeScript type to include days_since_last_activity so components can use it
acceptanceCriteria: PipelineDeal interface includes days_since_last_activity: number | null
Fallback query computes days_since_last_activity when RPC unavailable
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Freshness Badge on DealCard
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to see a color-coded freshness indicator on each deal card so I can instantly spot which deals need attention
acceptanceCriteria: DealCard shows badge with days since last activity and Lucide icon
Color coding: emerald (0-7d), amber (8-14d), red (15-21d), grey (21+d)
Tooltip shows 'Last activity X days ago'
Deals with no activity data show no badge
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: Group 1 — no dependencies (can stub data initially)

userStories.title: Dormant Visual Treatment
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want deals with 30+ days of no activity to appear visually dimmed so I can focus on active deals
acceptanceCriteria: Deals with days_since_last_activity >= 30 have reduced opacity
Small 'Dormant' label on the card
Distinct from Lost stage deals
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Sort Dormant Deals to Bottom
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want dormant deals pushed to the bottom of each pipeline column so active deals are front and center
acceptanceCriteria: Deals with days_since_last_activity >= 30 sort after non-dormant deals
Within dormant group, existing sort order preserved
Drag-and-drop still works for dormant deals
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Exclude Dormant from Forecast + Add Dormant Filter
userStories.description: As a sales manager, I want dormant deals excluded from weighted forecast values and a Dormant quick filter to show/hide them
acceptanceCriteria: RPC stage metrics weighted_value excludes deals with days_since_last_activity >= 30
Summary weighted_value also excludes dormant
Stage metric deal_count still includes dormant deals
Add dormant_count to summary statistics
Pipeline header quick filters include Dormant option
npx supabase db push --linked --dry-run passes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: RPC for Stale Deals by Owner
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an RPC that returns stale deals grouped by owner so the digest edge function can query per-rep deal lists
acceptanceCriteria: New RPC get_stale_deals_for_digest(p_org_id TEXT) returns JSONB grouped by owner_id
Each deal includes: id, name, company, value, stage_name, days_since_last_activity, expected_close_date, ghost_probability, stale_reason
Stale criteria: days_since_last_activity >= 14 OR expected_close_date < NOW() OR ghost_probability_percent >= 70
Only includes status = active deals
SECURITY DEFINER with search_path = public
npx supabase db push --linked --dry-run passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Slack Block Kit Builder for Hygiene Digest
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Block Kit builder that formats the hygiene digest into a rich Slack message with action buttons
acceptanceCriteria: New function buildPipelineHygieneDigest(data) in slackBlocks.ts
Header with deal count and date
Deals grouped by stale reason with section headers
Per-deal action buttons: Snooze 7d, Draft Follow-up, Close as Lost
Snooze All bulk action button when 3+ deals
Truncates to top 15 deals with 'and X more...' note
Respects Slack Block Kit limits
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Pipeline Hygiene Digest Edge Function
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to receive a weekly Slack DM listing my stale deals so I'm reminded to act on them
acceptanceCriteria: New edge function pipeline-hygiene-digest
Auth: service role only
Iterates active orgs, calls get_stale_deals_for_digest RPC
Resolves Slack user IDs via slack_user_mappings
Sends Slack DM using sendSlackDM() with 500ms delay between sends
Skips users with no stale deals
Supports ?dryRun=true and ?singleUserId=X params
Writes summary to Command Centre
Uses runAgent wrapper for telemetry
Logs errors per-user without failing entire batch
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Slack Interactive Handler for Hygiene Actions
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to click action buttons in the digest and have the system create follow-up items
acceptanceCriteria: New handlers: hygiene_snooze_7d, hygiene_draft_followup, hygiene_close_lost, hygiene_snooze_all
Snooze: creates CC item, sets snoozed_until metadata
Draft Follow-up: creates CC item with item_type follow_up
Close as Lost: creates CC item with confirmation step
Snooze All: applies snooze to all deals in digest
Updates original Slack message to reflect action taken
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Cron Migration for Weekly Schedule
userStories.description: As a system, I want the digest to run automatically every Monday at 9am UTC
acceptanceCriteria: New migration creates pg_cron job at 0 9 * * 1
Scheduled after health score recalc
Uses net.http_post() with x-cron-secret header
Idempotent: cron.unschedule before cron.schedule
npx supabase db push --linked --dry-run passes

userStories.title: Register pipeline_hygiene as CC Source
userStories.description: As a developer, I want pipeline_hygiene registered as a valid Command Centre source agent
acceptanceCriteria: pipeline_hygiene added to SourceAgent type
Dedup logic handles pipeline_hygiene source correctly
Typecheck passes
